summary:
Claim: Dexamethasone does not lower intraocular pressure (IOP).  
Evidence: - Dexamethasone stimulates aqueous humor production, increasing IOP. - Other listed drugs (clonidine, mannitol, acetazolamide) all reduce IOP via distinct mechanisms.  
Answer: C
